name: Debbie
title: Store Overseer
core_trait: Calm, understanding leadership that stabilizes the entire environment
real_summary: Debbie is the boss and the emotional center of the store. Kind, patient, and understanding, she keeps everything running smoothly while supporting her team. She brings calm authority and a steady presence that everyone relies on.
power_summary: Debbie stabilizes the entire system, preventing chaos from escalating and maintaining balance between all moving parts.
abilities: Provides emotional grounding to the team
activation_trigger: Rising tension, conflict, or instability in the store

power_translation.real_world: Being a steady, supportive boss who keeps things running
power_translation.comic_world: Emits a stabilizing field that keeps the entire system from breaking down

quirks_and_ticks: Encourages small moments of care (like breaks, conversation)
Allows small human moments in a busy environment
Trusted by everyone without needing to assert authority loudly

uniform.details: tucked in, Clark’s Pump-n-Shop in UK blue letters, no border

effects: stabilizing aura that reduces visual chaos

notes: Represents balance, care, and control; the system fails without her
